page_title: ALL ABOUT NAGISA KAWORU - A CHILD OF THE EVANGELION
text:
is an artbook written by Ryōta Fujitsu, Hitomi Wada and キツカワトモ, Hidekuni Shida, published by Kadokawa Shoten in 25 October 2008.

Overview

The book is a collection of interviews, analysis, fan-letters, manga pages, stills from the TV series, films and illustrations about Kaworu Nagisa.

Table of Contents

In 2002 KAWORU NAGISA was revived on the Evangelion: 1.0 06
Who is Kaworu? 16
In 1995 KAWORU NAGISA appeared on the NEON GENESIS EVANGELION 20
In 1997 KAWORU NAGISA was lost beforehand in THE END DE EVANGELION 43
LOVE LOVE LOVE YOUR LOVE KAWORU! 52
Interview with Kunihiko Ikuhara and Yasufumi Nakoshi 54
Review about Kaworu - Tetra Tanizaki and Keinojo Miztama 60
KEYWORD EXPLANATION ANIMATION Ver. 66
Kaworu Studies 1 69
Kaworu Studies 2 71
FIRST CONTACT HIGHLIGHT - Entrance 73
SECOND IMPACT HIGHLIGHT 2 - I don't want to go home. 85
THIRD DRAMA HIGHLIGHT 3 - Kiss 91
FOURTH COMMUNICATION HIGHLIGHT 4 - Jealousy 103
FIFTH CHILDREN HIGHLIGHT 5 - I don't like you. 107
SIXTH MOVEMENT HIGHLIGHT 6 - Will 117
SEVENTH HEAVEN HIGHLIGHT 7 - Death 131
Interview: Yoshiyuki Sadamoto 146
DICTIONARY OF KAWORU COMICS VER 156
Kaworu Studies 3 160
Kaworu Studies 4 166
The 17 Fan Mails 168
NO KAWORU NO LIFE! TRIBUTE COMIC 172
KAWORU'S GLAMUROUS SIDE 3D 190
The Examination of Kaworu 192
KAWORU'S BODY ANALYSIS 194
KAWORU COUNT NUMBERS 196
KAWORU ILLUSTRATIONS 198
TRIBUTE GRAVURE KAWORU X CHISATO MORISHITA 208
KAWORU ILLUSTRATIONS by YOSHIYUKI SADAMOTO 214
